task_completion.description: Open the Landsat 7 RGB image in the image processing software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'landsat7_rgb.tif' loaded in the Product Explorer or main window of the application (e.g., SNAP).

task_completion.description: Open the Resampling tool or dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Resampling' window or dialog box open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the target width to 400 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Resampling dialog, look for the 'Target Width' field explicitly set to '400'.

task_completion.description: Set the upsampling and downsampling methods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Resampling dialog, look for the 'Upsampling method' set to 'Bilinear' and 'Downsampling method' set to 'Mean'.

task_completion.description: Save the resampled product in BEAM-DIMAP format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog showing the file being saved as 'landsat7_resampled' with BEAM-DIMAP format, or a file manager/terminal showing 'landsat7_resampled.dim' in '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

task_completion.description: Export the resampled product as a GeoTIFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog showing the file being saved as 'landsat7_resampled.tif' with GeoTIFF format, or a file manager/terminal showing the '.tif' file in '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the application to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the application's menus, dialogs, and buttons rather than terminal commands like 'gdalwarp' or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The resampling parameters were entered into the actual software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameters (400 width, Bilinear, Mean) must be visible in the application's Resampling dialog, not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The output files were generated through the software's save/export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the software's progress bars or success messages during saving/exporting, ensuring the agent didn't just copy and rename the original file using a file manager or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source file: /home/ga/snap_data/landsat7_rgb.tif (contains exactly 3 bands). Target width: exactly 400 pixels. Expected BEAM-DIMAP export path: /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat7_resampled.dim. Expected GeoTIFF export path: /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat7_resampled.tif.
